ddls:
CREATE TABLE "print_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each print size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the print size */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the print in inches */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the print in inches */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the print */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the size is a custom size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., coating, finish) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the service is included by default */,
  "additional_cost" REAL /* Additional cost if the service is not included by default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing option */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the print size */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the service on the specified print size */,
  "min_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required for the price to apply */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity allowed for the price to apply */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the price is discounted */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_pricing_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES print_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_pricing_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "print_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of option (e.g., coating, finish) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the option is required */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the option can be customized */,
  "customization_cost" REAL /* Additional cost for customization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each print size
Width of the print in inches
Height of the print in inches
Flag indicating if the size is a custom size
Flag indicating if the service is included by default
Additional cost if the service is not included by default
Unique identifier for each pricing option
Price for the service on the specified print size
Minimum quantity required for the price to apply
Maximum quantity allowed for the price to apply
Flag indicating if the price is discounted
Flag indicating if the option is required
Flag indicating if the option can be customized
